revision.comment: Created page with "== Shrines Enshrining Toyokumono-no-Mikoto == * {{ill|Mononobe Shrine|ja|物部神社|lt=Monobe Shrine}} – within the precincts, {{ill|Jinsei Shichidai Shrine|ja|神代七代社|lt=Jinsei Shichidai Shrine}} (Shimane Prefecture, Ōta City, Kawai Town) * {{ill|Inbe Shrine|ja|忌部神社|lt=Inebe Shrine}} (Shimane Prefecture, Matsue City, Higashiinebe Town) * {{ill|Homi Suwa Fifteen Shrines|ja|穂見諏訪十五所神社|lt=Homi Suwa Fifteen Shrines}} (Yamanashi Prefectu..."
revision.text: == Shrines Enshrining Toyokumono-no-Mikoto == * {{ill|Mononobe Shrine|ja|物部神社|lt=Monobe Shrine}} – within the precincts, {{ill|Jinsei Shichidai Shrine|ja|神代七代社|lt=Jinsei Shichidai Shrine}} (Shimane Prefecture, Ōta City, Kawai Town) * {{ill|Inbe Shrine|ja|忌部神社|lt=Inebe Shrine}} (Shimane Prefecture, Matsue City, Higashiinebe Town) * {{ill|Homi Suwa Fifteen Shrines|ja|穂見諏訪十五所神社|lt=Homi Suwa Fifteen Shrines}} (Yamanashi Prefecture, Hokuto City, Nagasaka Town) * {{ill|Kumano Hayatama Taisha|ja|熊野速玉大社|lt=Kumano Hayatama Taisha}} (Wakayama Prefecture, Shingu City, Shingu) * {{ill|Miyaura Shrine|ja|宮浦宮|lt=Miyaura Shrine}} (Kagoshima Prefecture, Kirishima City, Fukumamachi) * {{ill|Yashiro Shrine|ja|埜神社|lt=Yashiro Shrine}} (Aichi Prefecture, Toyota City, Noguchi Town) * {{ill|Ōagata Shrine|ja|大縣神社|lt=Okitsu Shrine}} – within the precincts, {{ill|Okuniemeishu Shrine|ja|大国恵比須神社|lt=Okuniemeishu Shrine}} (Aichi Prefecture, Inuyama City, Miyama) * {{ill|Arakashi Shrine|ja|荒橿神社|lt=Arakashi Shrine}} (Tochigi Prefecture, Haga District, Mogi Town) * {{ill|Niarayama Shrine|ja|二荒山神社|lt=Niarayama Shrine}} – within the precincts, twelve shrines (Tochigi Prefecture, Utsunomiya City, Baba Street) * {{ill|Munagata Shrine|ja|胸形神社|lt=Munagata Shrine}} (Tochigi Prefecture, Kanuma City, Murai Town) * {{ill|Sanmyo Shrine|ja|三明神社|lt=Sanmyo Shrine}} (Aichi Prefecture, Inuyama City, Uchikubo) [[Category:Toyokumonu forks]][[category:new pages]]

* ity, Fukumamachi) * {{ill|Yashiro Shrine|ja|埜神社|lt=Yashiro Shrine}} (Aichi Prefecture, Toyota City, Noguchi Town) * {{ill|Ōagata Shrine|ja|大縣神社|lt=Okitsu Shrine}} – within the precincts, {{ill|Okuniemeishu Shrine|ja|大国恵比須神社|lt=Okuniemeishu Shrine}} (Aichi Prefecture, Inuyama City, Miyama) * {{ill|Arakashi Shrine|ja|荒橿神社|lt=Arakashi Shrine}} (Tochigi Prefecture, Haga District, Mogi Town) * {{ill|Niarayama Shrine|ja|二荒山神社|lt=Niarayama Shrine}} – within the precincts, twelve shrines (Tochigi Prefecture, Utsunomiya City, Baba Street) * {{ill|Munagata Shrine|ja|胸形神社|lt=Munagata Shrine}} (Tochigi Prefecture, Kanuma City, Murai Town) * {{ill|Sanmyo Shrine|ja|三明神社|lt=Sanmyo Shrine}} (Aichi Prefecture, Inuyama City, Uchikubo) [[Category:Toyokumonu forks]][[category:new pages]]

{{nihongo|'''Yashiro Shrine'''|箭代神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yashiro Shrine'''|箭代神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yashiro Shrine'''|箭代神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yashiro Shrine'''|箭代神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].
